yogas.name: Dhana Yoga
yogas.description: Lords of 2nd and 11th houses are conjunct, indicating strong wealth potential.
yogas.effects: Accumulation of wealth through multiple sources.

yogas.name: Raja Yoga
yogas.description: Lords of trikona and kendra houses (Venus and Mercury) are conjunct.
yogas.effects: Rise to positions of power and authority.

yogas.name: Nipuna (Budha-Aditya) Yoga
yogas.description: Sun and Mercury conjunction, bestowing intelligence and communication skills.
yogas.effects: Sharp intellect, good communication, and analytical abilities.

yogas.name: Chandra-Mangala Yoga
yogas.description: Moon and Mars conjunction, indicating earning through courage and initiative.
yogas.effects: Wealth through bold actions and entrepreneurship.

yogas.name: Saraswati Yoga
yogas.description: Jupiter, Venus, and Mercury well-placed, bestowing knowledge and artistic talents.
yogas.effects: Excellence in learning, arts, and creative expression.

yogas.name: Lakshmi Yoga
yogas.description: 9th lord well-placed in kendra or trikona, blessing with fortune and prosperity.
yogas.effects: Good fortune, wealth, and spiritual growth.

yogas.name: Pushkala Yoga
yogas.description: Moon sign lord and Lagna lord are conjunct in a good house.
yogas.effects: Wealth, honor, and sweet speech.

yogas.name: Vesi Yoga
yogas.description: Formed by Mars in 2nd house from Sun.
yogas.effects: May have weak eyesight but firm in word and hardworking. Financially stable.

yogas.name: Bhadra Maha Purusha Yoga
yogas.description: Mercury in Kendra (1, 4, 7, 10) in its own or exalted sign (Gemini/Virgo).
yogas.effects: Knowledgeable, joyful, supportive of family. Excellent communication skills, analytical mind, good sense of humor.

yogas.name: Sun + Mercury + Venus Yoga
yogas.description: Sun, Mercury, and Venus conjunction.
yogas.effects: Insatiable nature, talkative demeanor, inclination towards travel. Skilled in arts and luxury.

yogas.name: Sun + Venus (Dwi Graha)
yogas.description: Sun and Venus conjunction.
yogas.effects: Charming personality, skilled in arts, attraction to luxury. Potential for leadership.

yogas.name: Mercury + Venus (Dwi Graha)
yogas.description: Mercury and Venus conjunction.
yogas.effects: Considerable wealth, eloquence in speech, talents in singing/humor.

houseOverlays.description: Partner A's Sun in Partner B's 8th House: An intense and transformative connection. Partner A triggers deep changes in Partner B's psyche. Issues of shared resources, intimacy, and secrets come to the forefront. Highly magnetic.
Partner A's Moon in Partner B's 9th House: Shared emotional philosophy. Travel and learning bring you closer emotionally.
Partner A's Mars in Partner B's 9th House: Adventure buddies. You challenge each other's beliefs. Active travel or learning.
Partner A's Mercury in Partner B's 8th House: Deep, probing conversations. You share secrets and explore depths.
Partner A's Jupiter in Partner B's 10th House: Professional success. Partner A boosts Partner B's reputation.
Partner A's Venus in Partner B's 8th House: A deep, intense, and possibly obsessive attraction. Sexual chemistry is profound and transformative. Finances may be merged.
Partner A's Saturn in Partner B's 1st House: A serious, karmic bond. Partner A has a sobering effect on Partner B. Indicates responsibility and maturity, but can feel restrictive.
Partner A's Rahu in Partner B's 9th House: Obsession with non-traditional beliefs or travel.
Partner A's Ketu in Partner B's 3rd House: Quiet or intuitive communication.

Partner B's Sun in Partner A's 9th House: Partner B expands Partner A's horizons. This relationship involves travel, philosophy, and higher learning. Partner B inspires Partner A to grow and see the bigger picture.
Partner B's Moon in Partner A's 7th House: Partner A sees Partner B as 'family-like' and emotionally supportive. Partner B wants to care for Partner A. Great for long-term domestic life.
Partner B's Mars in Partner A's 9th House: Adventure buddies. You challenge each other's beliefs. Active travel or learning.
Partner B's Mercury in Partner A's 9th House: Intellectual expansion. Travel and philosophy are shared topics.
Partner B's Jupiter in Partner A's 9th House: Shared philosophy and travel. Partner B is a teacher/mentor figure to Partner A. Spiritual growth is key.
Partner B's Venus in Partner A's 7th House: A strong indicator of love and marriage. Partner B embodies what Partner A desires in a partner. Harmony and balance are natural.
Partner B's Saturn in Partner A's 10th House: Power couple potential. You build a legacy. Partner B stabilizes Partner A's career.
Partner B's Rahu in Partner A's 3rd House: Intense communication or shared mental goals.
Partner B's Ketu in Partner A's 9th House: Shared spiritual philosophy and non-attachment.

planetaryConjunctions.description: Saturn and Mars energies merge.This creates a strong bond and mutual understanding in the areas ruled by these planets.

d9Overlays.description: Partner A's Moon in Partner B's Navamsa 9th House: Emotional growth is tied to your shared dharma. They provide intuitive guidance on your joint spiritual journey.
Partner A's Mars in Partner B's Navamsa 9th House: Active pursuit of dharma. Your partner pushes you to be courageous in your spiritual or philosophical path within the marriage.
Partner A's Planet in Partner B's Navamsa Lagna: A very strong indicator of marriage. This planet directly influences your marital identity and path.
Partner B's Moon in Partner A's Navamsa 9th House: Emotional growth is tied to your shared dharma. They provide intuitive guidance on your joint spiritual journey.
Partner B's Venus in Partner A's Navamsa 9th House: Luck in love. Your partner brings grace and ease to your shared destiny, often through shared cultural or spiritual appreciation.

cslConnection.description: Partner A and Partner B's 7th Sub-Lords are in a neutral state, indicating a stable but non-specific technical connection.

rulingPlanetConnection.description: Deeper Life Resonance: Partner A's core life-force energy harmonizes beautifully with Partner B, promoting a natural ease and mutual support in your shared journey.

darakarakaContact.description: Darakaraka Kendra (1/4/7/10): This is a dynamic and industrious soul connection. You challenge each other to become the highest versions of yourselves, building a solid and active life together.

crossChartAspects.interpretation: Rahul's Uranus conjunct Ashwini's Venus — instant, lightning-bolt attraction. An intensely exciting but potentially disruptive love connection. The relationship feels fated but demands freedom within commitment.
Ashwini's Uranus trines Rahul's Venus — stimulating and refreshing love dynamic. Both enjoy an unconventional approach to romance, keeping the spark alive through novelty and intellectual connection.
Rahul's Uranus sextiles Ashwini's Mars — dynamic, exciting energy. Both inspire each other to take bold action and try new things. Great for shared entrepreneurial or athletic pursuits.

Ashwini's Uranus squares Rahul's Mars — volatile energy that can manifest as sudden conflicts or impulsive actions. Both may provoke each other into rash decisions. Channel this into shared adventures.
Ashwini's Uranus squares Rahul's Moon — emotional unpredictability. Rahul may feel emotionally unsettled by Ashwini's need for change. Establishing emotional safety rituals is essential.
Ashwini's Uranus trines Rahul's Sun — Ashwini enriches Rahul's self-expression with innovation. A stimulating and expansive connection.

Rahul's Neptune conjunct Ashwini's Venus — a soul-level romantic connection that borders on the mystical. Boundaries dissolve in love. Extraordinarily beautiful but requires grounding to prevent co-dependency.

Rahul's Neptune sextiles Ashwini's Mars — inspired action. Ashwini's drive is channeled into creative, spiritual, or compassionate pursuits through Rahul's influence. Great for artistic collaboration.
Ashwini's Neptune trines Rahul's Sun — Ashwini enriches Rahul's self-expression with imagination. A stimulating and expansive connection.
Rahul's Pluto sextiles Ashwini's Venus — deep, transformative love that heals old wounds. Both experience profound emotional and sexual bonding. Love is regenerative and empowering.
Ashwini's Pluto sextiles Rahul's Venus — deep, transformative love that heals old wounds. Both experience profound emotional and sexual bonding. Love is regenerative and empowering.
Rahul's Pluto trines Ashwini's Mars — powerfully transformative drive. Both push each other to achieve extraordinary things. Intense sexual chemistry and shared ambition can move mountains together.
Rahul's Pluto squares Ashwini's Sun — Rahul challenges Ashwini's identity and ego through transformation. This creates growth through tension.
Ashwini's Pluto sextiles Rahul's Sun — Ashwini enriches Rahul's self-expression with transformation. A stimulating and expansive connection.
Rahul's Pluto squares Ashwini's Mercury — Rahul challenges Ashwini's thinking and communication through transformation. This creates growth through tension.

attachmentPatterns.name: Secure Attachment — Ashwini
attachmentPatterns.description: Ashwini shows secure attachment patterns: comfortable with intimacy, able to communicate needs, and trusting in relationships.

shadowDynamics.name: Power Shadow Activation
shadowDynamics.description: Rahul's Pluto squares Ashwini's Sun — Rahul activates Ashwini's shadow around power, control, and authentic self-expression. Ashwini may feel simultaneously drawn to and threatened by Rahul's intensity.
shadowDynamics.growthOpportunity: This dynamic pushes Ashwini to reclaim personal power. Rahul can support by being transparent about motivations. Both grow through honest confrontation of power dynamics.

overallAttachmentStyle.compatibilityNote: Both partners show secure attachment — this is the ideal foundation for a healthy, lasting relationship with mutual trust and emotional availability.

remedies: Donate gold or grains on auspicious days

Donate black and blue items on Saturdays

patterns.name: Complex Romantic History
patterns.description: The 5th house is heavily active with 3 planets. This typically indicates a life where romantic experiences have been a major avenue for self-discovery. You likely have a history of falling in love deeply and often, with each relationship shaping your identity significantly.
patterns.advice: Ensure your current partner understands that your past was a "training ground," not a comparison chart.

counterBalance.title: Specific Counter: Ishta Devata Protection
counterBalance.text: Benefics/Moksha planets (Moon) in 12th from Karakamsa indicate a spiritual path that prioritizes liberation over worldly indulgence

patterns.name: Unconventional Romantic Desires
patterns.description: Rahu in the 5th house creates intense, unconventional, and sometimes obsessive romantic attraction. May be drawn to unusual or taboo romantic situations.
patterns.advice: Self-awareness about obsessive tendencies in romance helps channel this energy constructively.

counterBalance.title: General Stabilizer: KP Dharmic Alignment
counterBalance.text: 7th Cusp Sub-Lord connects to the 9th House of Dharma, indicating that righteousness is a core value in relationships.

patterns.name: Financial/Business Partnership Trigger
patterns.description: The direct connection between wealth sectors (2nd/11th) and relationships suggests that shared financial goals or business dealings are a primary avenue for emotional entanglement. You may confuse financial compatibility or business synergy with romantic destiny. ( + 7th Lord in 2nd/11th of D2 (Hora))
patterns.advice: Keep business and personal accounts/interactions rigidly separate. Do not mix romance with investment discussions.

counterBalance.title: General Stabilizer: KP Dharmic Alignment
counterBalance.text: 7th Cusp Sub-Lord connects to the 9th House of Dharma, indicating that righteousness is a core value in relationships.

patterns.name: Family/Taboo Connection Pattern
patterns.description: Planetary afflictions involving the 4th/9th houses (D1/D12) suggest a complex psychological pattern where "forbidden" or "taboo" dynamics trigger attraction. This indicates a high-risk pattern suggesting potential for boundary-crossing within close family circles or extended domestic networks. ( + 7th Lord in 4th/9th of D12 (Dwadasamsa))
patterns.advice: Strict adherence to social and familial boundaries is essential. Seek professional guidance if you notice patterns of attraction to inappropriate or unavailable figures.

counterBalance.title: Specific Counter: KP Dharmic Alignment
counterBalance.text: 7th Cusp Sub-Lord connects to the 9th House of Dharma, indicating that righteousness is a core value in relationships.

patterns.name: Spiritual/Mentorship Connection
patterns.description: A link between the 7th and 9th houses often creates an attraction to mentors, gurus, or figures of authority in spiritual settings. The danger here is idealizing a guide or teacher and confusing spiritual intimacy with romantic love. ( + 7th Lord in 9th/5th of D20 (Spiritual Chart))
patterns.advice: Distinguish clearly between spiritual devotion and personal intimacy. Avoid one-on-one private sessions with mentors.

counterBalance.title: General Stabilizer: Atmakaraka Nobility
